text.title: Design System Success Factors Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example applying Design System Success Factors to a concrete case.

section.title: Q2 2026 health snapshot

example.code:
Owner: design-system-lead@example.com Docs freshness: 7 days (auto-generated on every release) Adoption: checkout 92%, search 71%, billing 45% ⚠ Contribution model: documented; last 5 PRs via RFC Coverage: 78.5% (target 80%, on track)
Remediation plan: pair-design with billing team Q3 to lift adoption from 45% → 70%.

section.note: Per-team adoption surfaces the billing gap; remediation plan attached because billing is <70%.
